form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional and went on to clock 19.07 in a 0.8 lengths win at this track over 350m. Was in the money two on end before breaking through last start. Stick with him.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional and went on to clock 19.07 in a 0.8 lengths win at this track over 350m. Was in the money two on end before breaking through last start. Stick with him.

form.formComment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 300m at this track by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 4. In line for a hat-trick. Must include.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 300m at this track by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 4. In line for a hat-trick. Must include.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at his last run before a break of three months when seventh at Sandown over 515m. Boxed well and with a good break will go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings at his last run before a break of three months when seventh at Sandown over 515m. Boxed well and with a good break will go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Collided approaching first turn and fell.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 2.25 lengths third but did clock an excellent 19.21 for the 350m trip. Bold showing expected but prefer each way again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 2.25 lengths third but did clock an excellent 19.21 for the 350m trip. Bold showing expected but prefer each way again.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (16.60) at big odds over 300m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (16.60) at big odds over 300m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 300m at this track. Not far from winner last time but has the job ahead here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 300m at this track. Not far from winner last time but has the job ahead here.

form.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (16.69) at this track over 300m. Has clocked a scorching 16.3 here at this trip. Leading player.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow sixth (16.75) over 300m at this track. Must be included.
